name: Gokumon

signature_move.name: Dokuro Ranbu
signature_move.description: 12Grabs the opponent with theGuilty Chainand decapitates them with theJudgment Sickle.Unleashes a rush of slashing attacks with theJudgment Sickle.

description: A fugitive Digimon born from the data of wanted criminals. This strange villain fully believes itself to be a "Bounty Hunter" and hunts criminals down, although there is actually a price on its own head. Its Special Move is grabbing the opponent with the " Guilty Chain " on its left arm, and decapitating them with the " Judgment Sickle " on its right ( Dokuro Ranbu ).
